Eurocode 1¶

Eurocode 2¶

ec2.uls.ec2_shear.shear_asws(bw: float, d: float, fck: float, g_c: float, fyk: float, g_s: float, cott: float, ved: float, alpha: float) → Tuple[float, float][source]¶

Calculates the design shear reinforcement

Args:

bw (float): shear width d (float): [description] fck (float): [description] g_c (float): concrete safety coefficient fyk (float): [description] g_s (float): steel safety coefficient cott (float): strut inclination [cot(theta)] ved (float): [description] alpha (float): [description]

Returns:

Tuple[float, float]: (shear reinforcement (Asw/s), Vrd.max)

ec2.uls.ec2_shear.shear_vrd(bw: float, d: float, fck: float, g_c: float, fyk: float, g_s: float, cott: float, asw_s: float, alpha: float) → Tuple[float, float][source]¶

Calculates the design shear strength Vrds and Vrd.max

Args:

bw (float): [description] d (float): [description] fck (float): [description] g_c (float): [description] fyk (float): [description] g_s (float): [description] cott (float): [description] asw_s (float): [description] alpha (float): [description]

Returns:

Tuple[float, float]: (shear reinforcement (Asw/s), Vrd.max)

ec2.uls.ec2_shear.shear_vrdc(bw: float, d: float, fck: float, g_c: float, rho_l: float) → Tuple[float, float, float][source]¶

[summary]

Args:

bw (float): [description] d (float): [description] fck (float): [description] g_c (float): [description] rho_l (float): [description]

Returns:

Tuple[float, float, float]: (vrd.min, vrd.c, vrd [min(vrd.mmin, vrd.c])

ec2.uls.ec2_bend_simple.bend_ast(b: float = 0.3, d: float = 0.5, med: float = 100.0, fck: float = 20.0, fyk: float = 400.0) → Tuple[float, float, float, float][source]¶

[summary]

Args:

b (float, optional): [description]. Defaults to 0.3. d (float, optional): [description]. Defaults to 0.5. med (float, optional): [description]. Defaults to 100.0. fck (float, optional): [description]. Defaults to 20.0. fyk (float, optional): [description]. Defaults to 400.0.

Returns:

Tuple[float, float, float, float]: [description]
